nasb.text: He who rebukes a man will afterward find more favor Than he who flatters with the tongue.

esv.text: Whoever rebukes a man will afterward find more favor than he who flatters with his tongue.

cnv.text: 責備人的，終必得人喜悅， 勝過那用舌頭諂媚人的。

ccb.text: 责备人的至终比谄媚者更受爱戴。

csbs.text: 责备人的，比说谄媚话的， 后来能得更多的恩惠。
